examples: The yeas are 52 and the nays are 49; the nomination is hereby confirmed.
It is hereby announced that there will be a talk on the international situation in the auditorium at 3 on Saturday afternoon.
I hereby resign as CEO of Apple. I would like to serve, if the Board sees fit, as Chairman of the Board, director, and Apple employee.
As a first step, I hereby heartily endorse the framework laid out by the Bowles-Simpson Commission.
The Attorney General is hereby authorized and directed to publish this memorandum in the Federal Register.
